rulings.Case Title: RAMIN ALIZADEH VS. COLLEEN MOHAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Andm Otion For Order Vacating/Setting Aside Stipulated Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 27, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT COLLEEN MOHAN's Motion And motion For Order Vacating/Setting Aside Stipulated Judgment: DENIED. Defendant fails to comply with CRC 3.110(a) and it is unclear what the grounds for Defendant's motion are. To the extent motion is based on either CCP 473(b) or CCP 1008, Defendant failed to sustain burden. Defendant admits that she failed to make timely payments due under the stipulation on April 1, 2014 and April 15, 2014. (Defendant's Declaration, paragraph 6). Under the stipulation failure to make a timely payment was grounds for request to lift a stay and issue a writ. = (501/REQ)

To the extent motion is based on either CCP 473(b) or CCP 1008, Defendant failed to sustain burden. Defendant admits that she failed to make timely payments due under the stipulation on April 1, 2014 and April 15, 2014. (Defendant's Declaration, paragraph 6). Under the stipulation failure to make a timely payment was grounds for request to lift a stay and issue a writ. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN TRIEU et al VS. DARYL J. DUSICH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 27, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT DARYL DUSICH's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice of Demurer fails to comply with CRC 3.110(a), i.e. grounds for issuance of the order are not stated in the opening paragraph. Attachment of the proof of service for the First Amended Complaint does not render the First Amended Complaint uncertain. = (501/REQ)
